input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.3.2
            TITLE: the etc systems form must be submitted in order to use etc

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.3.2: The ETC Systems Form must be submitted in order to use ETC
IC.4.3.2 The ETC Systems Form must be submitted in order to use ETC

final_answer: The ETC Systems Form must be submitted in order to use ETC
